description: Search Docmost for an existing canonical page before falling back to local files.
Enforce Tier-C guardrail and fork-context for the session. Load once per session when working on documentation tasks.

Gather a release changelog (git log / merged PRs / closed Linear issues since the previous version) and file it as a versioned release-notes child in the living wiki. Routes via doc-amend on the dated/append branch — a new version is a new dated child never an amend of a prior one.
args: <version e.g. v1.1; omit to infer from git tags>
